name: China Logistics Property Holdings Co., Ltd
summary: China Logistics Property Holdings Co., Ltd, an investment holding company, designs, develops, leases, and manages logistics facilities in the People's Republic of China. It develops and constructs storage facilities; and provides investment management, warehouse and house leasing, project investment, enterprise management consulting, cargo agency and transportation consulting, stowage loading and unloading and related business advisory, property development and management, landscape engineering, business information consulting, marketing planning, and enterprise image design services. The company also leases self-owned buildings; leases machinery and equipment; sells building materials; manufactures and sells automobile components and parts, steel structures, painted metal and other metals, and logistics equipment; and imports and exports goods and technology. In addition, it is involved in flowers, seedling, and fruit trees planting activities; and the wholesale and retail of packaging materials. Further, the company provides technology development, technical consulting, and technology transfer services in the field of Internet of Things technology, computer software and hardware, mechanical and electrical equipment, and electronic products. China Logistics Property Holdings Co., Ltd was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
